blockingIssues.description: deep_upsert does not fully satisfy VAL-UPSERT-009 for values_quant/values_cat: it only ensures some obj_desc_inst row exists for the object and never auto-creates the required obj_desc_quant/obj_desc_cat mapping rows before inserting values_quant/values_cat.
test/test_deep_upsert.py does not exercise the required deep_upsert(values_quant, ...) trigger-ordering path from VAL-UPSERT-009, so the missing prerequisite-chain behavior went undetected.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that repo-wide external-URL greps must exclude or narrowly scope around cached cassava metadata in test/test_ingest_f006.py, because those strings are pre-existing fixtures rather than live external calls.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The deep-upsert scrutiny review found the feature metadata verification step `rg 'amazonaws|cassava\.ucsd' test/` is stale for this repo: test/test_ingest_f006.py already contains intentional cassava URLs, so a repo-wide grep returns matches even when newly added tests are localhost-only.
